R1: activity_receives(tree, 'collect personal data', 'personalData') and executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service') and send_exist(tree, 'emailNotification')
R2: leads_to(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness') and leads_to(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'determine loan risk level')

R3: executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor') and (executed_by(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'post-processing clerk')) and not (executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'post-processing clerk')) and not (executed_by(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'supervisor'))

R4: executed_by(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'branch office manager') and leads_to(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'approve request') and leads_to(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'reject request')
R5: max_time_between(tree, 'sign loan contract', 'close loan offer', 604800, 'close loan offer')

R6: condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(loanCredit > 1000000)', 'check credit worthiness') and executed_by(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'supervisor') and data_leads_to_absence(tree, '(loanCredit > 1000000)', 'End Activity') and condition_directly_follows(tree, 'supervisorCheckAbsent == true', 'create suspense file') and failure_eventually_follows(tree, 'create suspense file', 'notify manager')

R7: condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(status == "gold")', 'check banking privileges', 'global') and data_leads_to_absence(tree, '(status == "gold") and (loanAmount < 1000000)', 'evaluate loan risk')
